recommendations.title: True Grit
recommendations.overview: The murder of her father sends a teenage tomboy on a mission of 'justice', which involves avenging her father's death. She recruits a tough old marshal, 'Rooster' Cogburn because he has 'true grit', and a reputation of getting the job done.

recommendations.title: Kiss of Death
recommendations.overview: An ex-con trying to go straight must face a crazed criminal out for revenge.

recommendations.title: The Desert Fox: The Story of Rommel
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Erwin Rommel and his involvement in the plot to assassinate Hitler.

recommendations.title: How the West Was Won
recommendations.overview: The epic tale of the development of the American West from the 1830s through the Civil War to the end of the century, as seen through the eyes of one pioneer family.
recommendations.director: Henry Hathaway, John Ford, George Marshall

recommendations.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
recommendations.overview: The four sons of Katie Elder reunite in their hometown of Clearwater, Texas for her funeral and discover that the family ranch is now in the hands of Morgan Hastings, a corrupt businessman who wants to exploit the area around the town.

recommendations.title: Nevada Smith
recommendations.overview: Nevada Smith is the young son of an Indian mother and white father. When his father is killed by three men over gold, Nevada sets out to find them and kill them. The boy is taken in by a gun merchant. The gun merchant shows him how to shoot and to sh

recommendations.title: Niagara
recommendations.overview: Rose Loomis and her older, gloomier husband, George, are vacationing at a cabin in Niagara Falls, N.Y. The couple befriend Polly and Ray Cutler, who are honeymooning in the area. Polly begins to suspect that something is amiss between Rose and George

recommendations.title: Call Northside 777
recommendations.overview: In 1932, a cop is killed and Frank Wiecek sentenced to life. Eleven years later, a newspaper ad by Frank's mother leads Chicago reporter P.J. O'Neal to look into the case. For some time, O'Neal continues to believe Frank guilty. But when he starts to

recommendations.title: Redeeming Love
recommendations.overview: A young couple's relationship clashes with the harsh realities of the California Gold Rush of 1850. Angel, experiencing love for the first time and facing demons unsurmountable, runs from the new life she doesn't believe she deserves. When Michael se

recommendations.title: Cat Ballou
recommendations.overview: A woman seeking revenge for her murdered father hires a famous gunman, but he's very different from what she expects.
